description: Apply for a fresh passport, renew an expiring passport, apply for a minor's passport, or obtain an emergency certificate for urgent travel.
documents: Proof of Date of Birth (Birth Certificate / Class 10 Marksheet)

description: Obtain a Police Clearance Certificate required for immigration, long-term foreign employment, student visa, and permanent residency abroad.
Register as an Overseas Citizen of India to obtain a lifelong multiple-entry visa and parity with NRI benefits for persons of Indian origin holding foreign nationality.
documents: Proof of Indian Origin (Previous Indian Passport / Birth Certificate)
fee: USD 275 (new application), USD 25 (re-issuance on new passport)

description: Foreign nationals can apply for an Indian e-Tourist, e-Business, or e-Medical Visa online before arrival at designated Indian airports and seaports.
fee: USD 10-80 (varies by nationality and visa type)

description: Foreigners staying in India for over 180 days must register with FRRO. Also used for visa extension, conversion, and exit permits.
Enroll for a new 12-digit Aadhaar unique identity number or update existing details including name, date of birth, address, mobile number, email, and biometrics.
documents: Proof of Identity (PAN / Voter ID / Passport)
Proof of Address (Bank Passbook / Utility Bill)
Proof of Date of Birth (Birth Certificate / Marksheet)
fee: Free (Enrollment), ₹50 (Update via Aadhaar centre), Free (Self-update online)

description: Generate Virtual ID (VID), lock/unlock biometrics, download e-Aadhaar, and access all Aadhaar self-service features through the UIDAI online portal.
Apply for a new Permanent Account Number (PAN) card, obtain an instant e-PAN linked to Aadhaar, or correct existing PAN details. Mandatory for income tax filing and high-value financial transactions.
ministry: Ministry of Finance – Central Board of Direct Taxes (CBDT)

description: File your annual Income Tax Return online, claim refunds, respond to notices, and access all income tax self-service features on the official e-filing portal.
ministry: Ministry of Finance – Central Board of Direct Taxes (CBDT)

description: Register for Goods and Services Tax (GST), file monthly or quarterly GSTR returns, pay taxes, and access GST self-service features on the official portal.
ministry: Ministry of Finance – Central Board of Indirect Taxes & Customs (CBIC)

description: Generate, update, cancel, and print E-Way Bills mandatory for movement of goods exceeding ₹50,000 in value across states or within a state under GST.
ministry: Ministry of Finance – Central Board of Indirect Taxes & Customs (CBIC)
documents: Invoice / Bill of Supply / Delivery Challan

description: Mandatory electronic invoice reporting system under GST for eligible taxpayers. Generate Invoice Reference Number (IRN) and QR codes for B2B invoices.
ministry: Ministry of Finance – Central Board of Indirect Taxes & Customs (CBIC)

description: File import/export customs declarations (Bills of Entry, Shipping Bills), pay customs duty, and access DGFT services through the Indian Customs EDI Gateway.
ministry: Ministry of Finance – Central Board of Indirect Taxes & Customs (CBIC)
fee: As per customs tariff (duty rates vary by HS code)

description: Register as a new voter, update your existing voter registration, request a duplicate EPIC card, or shift your voter registration to a new address on the National Voters' Services Portal.
Submit nomination papers, file affidavit of assets & liabilities, and manage election-related disclosures for candidates contesting elections in India.
Apply for a learner's licence, permanent driving licence, renewal of expired licence, international driving permit, or duplicate licence through the Sarathi portal.
Register a new vehicle, obtain or renew Registration Certificate (RC), transfer ownership, apply for NOC, add hypothecation, or obtain a duplicate RC through the Vahan portal.
Apply for a FASTag RFID sticker for electronic toll collection, link it to your bank account, recharge balance, and manage your National Electronic Toll Collection account.
fee: ₹100-₹200 (security deposit depending on vehicle class) + recharge amount

description: Verify vehicle emission standards compliance. Check PUC certificate validity and find authorised PUC testing centres on the official Parivahan portal.
Register a birth and obtain an official government-issued birth certificate, essential for school admission, passport, Aadhaar enrollment, and availing government benefits.
ministry: Office of the Registrar General of India – Ministry of Home Affairs
fee: ₹5-₹50 (varies by state and time of registration)

description: Register a death and obtain an official death certificate, required for inheritance claims, insurance settlement, bank account closure, and government pension discontinuation.
ministry: Office of the Registrar General of India – Ministry of Home Affairs
fee: ₹5-₹50 (varies by state and time of registration)

description: Register marriage under Hindu Marriage Act 1955 or Special Marriage Act 1954 and obtain a government-issued marriage certificate recognised for all legal and official purposes.
ministry: State Revenue / Urban Local Body Department
documents: Age Proof of Both Parties (Passport / Birth Certificate)

description: Obtain a state-issued domicile or residence certificate required for state quota reservations in education, employment, and government schemes.
documents: Proof of continuous residence in state (utility bills / voter ID)

description: Obtain a Scheduled Caste, Scheduled Tribe, or Other Backward Classes caste certificate required for reservation benefits in education, government employment, and welfare schemes.
documents: Parent's Caste Certificate or School Leaving Certificate

description: Obtain an annual income certificate issued by the revenue department, required for availing government subsidies, reservations, welfare schemes, and educational fee concessions.
Apply for a new ration card (AAY / PHH / NPHH), update family member details, change address, or surrender an existing card under the National Food Security Act.
ministry: Ministry of Consumer Affairs, Food & Public Distribution
documents: Aadhaar Cards of All Family Members
Surrender Certificate (if moving from another state)

description: Access your ration card benefits from any Fair Price Shop anywhere in India using Aadhaar-based biometric verification under the One Nation One Ration Card scheme.
ministry: Ministry of Consumer Affairs, Food & Public Distribution

description: Receive ₹6,000 annual income support in three equal installments of ₹2,000 each directly to bank accounts of eligible small and marginal farmer families.
Enroll in the Pradhan Mantri Fasal Bima Yojana (PMFBY) for financial support to farmers in case of crop failure due to natural calamities, pests, or diseases.
fee: 2% premium for Kharif crops, 1.5% for Rabi crops, 5% for commercial crops

description: Apply for a Kisan Credit Card providing revolving credit up to ₹3 lakh at subsidised interest rates for crop cultivation, post-harvest expenses, and allied agricultural activities.
fee: Free (processing fee at bank may vary)

description: Register as a farmer, trader, or FPO on the unified national electronic trading portal for agricultural commodities to access pan-India market prices and buyers.
Get your agricultural land's soil tested for nutrient status and receive a Soil Health Card with crop-wise fertilizer recommendations to improve soil health and yield.

service_name: PM Kisan Maan Dhan Yojana (Farmers' Pension)
description: Register for the Pradhan Mantri Kisan Maan Dhan Yojana to receive a minimum pension of ₹3,000 per month after the age of 60 for small and marginal farmers.
fee: ₹55-₹200 per month (contribution varies by entry age)

description: Enroll for Ayushman Bharat Pradhan Mantri Jan Arogya Yojana providing cashless health insurance coverage up to ₹5 lakh per family per year at empanelled hospitals.

service_name: ABHA Health Account (Ayushman Bharat Health Account)
description: Create a unique Ayushman Bharat Health Account (ABHA) ID for a digital health record linked to all your medical history, prescriptions, and lab reports under the National Digital Health Mission.
ministry: Ministry of Health & Family Welfare – NHA

description: Locate nearest Pradhan Mantri Jan Aushadhi Kendra to buy high-quality generic medicines at prices 50-90% lower than branded medicines. Register to open a new outlet.
fee: Free (using the service); ₹5,000 registration for outlet

description: Register for CGHS to avail comprehensive healthcare facilities including OPD, indoor treatment, specialist consultation, and medicines for central government employees and pensioners.
Access comprehensive health information, locate blood banks and hospitals, find government health schemes, and access citizen health services through India's official health information gateway.
Apply for housing assistance under PMAY-Urban for EWS/LIG/MIG categories including Credit Linked Subsidy Scheme (CLSS) and beneficiary-led construction.
Apply for housing assistance under PMAY-Gramin for construction of pucca houses for homeless families in rural areas, with direct benefit transfer to beneficiaries.
Access information, track projects, and avail citizen services under the Smart Cities Mission for 100 selected cities being developed with smart infrastructure and technology.
Track and access water supply, sewerage, drainage, urban transport, and green space development projects under the Atal Mission for Rejuvenation and Urban Transformation.
Activate UAN, withdraw or transfer PF balance, claim pension benefits, file joint declaration, update KYC, and manage all EPFO services online through the unified portal.
Register as an employer/employee under ESIC, access medical benefits, maternity benefits, disablement benefits, and file ESI contribution returns online.
fee: Employer: 3.25% of wages; Employee: 0.75% of wages

description: Register on the National Database of Unorganised Workers (NDUW) to avail social security benefits including accident insurance of ₹2 lakh and welfare scheme linkage.
Register as a job seeker, upload resume, apply for government and private sector jobs, find apprenticeship opportunities, and access skill development programs on India's national employment portal.
Enroll in PM-SYM pension scheme for unorganised sector workers to receive a guaranteed monthly pension of ₹3,000 after the age of 60 with minimal monthly contribution.
fee: ₹55-₹200 per month (varies by age of entry)

description: Register as an apprentice or employer under the National Apprenticeship Training Scheme. Students can apply for apprenticeships, employers can list openings, and industries can manage stipends.
ministry: Ministry of Education / Ministry of Skill Development & Entrepreneurship

description: Apply for over 100 central government and state government scholarship schemes for pre-matric, post-matric, and merit-based scholarships for SC/ST/OBC/Minority and EWS students.
ministry: Ministry of Education – National Scholarship Portal

description: ERP platform for central universities offering student services including admissions, examination management, result publication, fee payment, and certificate issuance.
Unified District Information System for Education Plus (UDISE+) provides data on all school infrastructure, teacher information, and student enrollment across India.
ministry: Ministry of Education – Department of School Education
documents: School DISE Code (for school data entry)

description: Apply for the Joint Entrance Examination (JEE) Main conducted by NTA for admission to NITs, IIITs, CFTIs, and other engineering institutions.
ministry: Ministry of Education – National Testing Agency

description: Apply for the National Eligibility cum Entrance Test (NEET-UG) conducted by NTA for admission to MBBS, BDS, BAMS, BSMS, BUMS, and BHMS programs across India.
ministry: Ministry of Education – National Testing Agency

description: Access UGC approved university and college list, apply for NET fellowship, verify fake university list, access approved program list, and UGC scholarship programs.
ministry: Ministry of Education – University Grants Commission

description: Register your Micro, Small, or Medium Enterprise on the Udyam portal to get MSME status, access credit guarantees, government tenders, and financial subsidies.
ministry: Ministry of Micro, Small & Medium Enterprises

description: Get DPIIT recognition for your startup to access tax exemptions (Section 80-IAC), self-certification compliance, patent fee rebates, and government scheme benefits.
ministry: Department for Promotion of Industry and Internal Trade (DPIIT)

description: Register as a seller on Government e-Marketplace to supply goods and services to central and state government buyers, departments, and PSUs through a transparent online procurement system.
Incorporate a company (Private Limited, Public Limited, OPC, LLP), file annual returns, update director details, and access all Ministry of Corporate Affairs services through MCA-21.
documents: Director's PAN Card and Aadhaar Card
Memorandum and Articles of Association (MoA / AoA)

description: File patent applications, register trademarks, apply for geographical indications, and register industrial designs through the intellectual property office.
ministry: Department for Promotion of Industry and Internal Trade (DPIIT)
documents: Power of Attorney (if filed through agent)

service_name: PMEGP – Prime Minister's Employment Generation Programme
description: Apply for PMEGP to set up new micro enterprises in non-farm sector with subsidy of 15-35% of project cost to generate self-employment for youth and artisans.

service_name: MUDRA Loan – Pradhan Mantri MUDRA Yojana
description: Access collateral-free micro loans under Shishu (up to ₹50,000), Kishor (₹50,000-₹5 lakh), and Tarun (₹5-₹10 lakh) categories for non-corporate small business activities.
fee: Free (application); interest rate as per lending institution

description: Apply for collateral-free working capital loans of ₹10,000 (1st loan), ₹20,000 (2nd), and ₹50,000 (3rd) for street vendors with digital transaction incentives and credit history building.
documents: Letter of Recommendation / Vending Certificate from ULB

description: Apply for an Import Export Code (IEC) mandatory for all importers and exporters in India, issued by the Directorate General of Foreign Trade (DGFT).
Store, access, and share government-issued digital documents including Aadhaar, PAN, driving licence, vehicle RC, marksheets, degree certificates, and insurance policies in one secure digital wallet.

service_name: UMANG – Unified Mobile Application for New-age Governance
description: Access 1,500+ government services from all major central and state departments on a single mobile application including EPF passbook, CBSE, EPFO, Aadhaar, NPS, and more.
Register and use BHIM (Bharat Interface for Money) for instant bank-to-bank money transfers using UPI through mobile number, Aadhaar, or VPA (Virtual Payment Address).
View and participate in central government tenders and procurement notices from all ministries and departments through the Central Public Procurement Portal.
fee: Tender document fee as specified; free to view

description: Access and download open government datasets published by central ministries, state governments, and autonomous bodies for research, analysis, and application development.
Open an NPS account (Tier I and Tier II) for retirement savings with tax benefits under Section 80CCD(1), 80CCD(1B), and 80CCD(2), regulated by PFRDA.
ministry: Pension Fund Regulatory and Development Authority (PFRDA) – Ministry of Finance

description: Apply for pensions under NSAP schemes including IGNOAPS (old age), IGNWPS (widow), IGNDPS (disability), and NFBS (death of breadwinner) for BPL households.
Avail life insurance and endowment plans under Postal Life Insurance (PLI) for government employees and Rural Postal Life Insurance (RPLI) for rural population.
ministry: Department of Posts – Ministry of Communications
fee: Premium as per policy and sum assured

service_name: Post Office Savings Schemes (PPF / NSC / KVP)
description: Invest in government-backed savings instruments including PPF, National Savings Certificate (NSC), Kisan Vikas Patra (KVP), Senior Citizens Savings Scheme (SCSS), and Sukanya Samriddhi Yojana through post offices.
ministry: Ministry of Finance – National Savings Institute
fee: Investment amount as per scheme minimum

description: Open a zero-balance Jan Dhan savings account at any bank or post office to access banking, remittances, RuPay debit card with accident insurance of ₹2 lakh, and overdraft facility.
ministry: Ministry of Finance – Department of Financial Services

description: Search and register security interests on movable and immovable properties including mortgages, to prevent multiple loans on the same property or asset.
ministry: Ministry of Finance – Reserve Bank of India

service_name: Pradhan Mantri Ujjwala Yojana (PMUY) – LPG Connection
description: Apply for a free LPG connection under PMUY for women belonging to BPL / SC / ST / PM-AWAS / PMAY-G beneficiary households with free first refill and stove.
Apply for free electricity connection under PM Sahaj Bijli Har Ghar Yojana – Saubhagya for rural and urban households without electricity.

service_name: Jal Jeevan Mission – Har Ghar Nal
description: Track status of piped drinking water supply under Jal Jeevan Mission for rural households. Gram Panchayats and citizens can access IMIS dashboard for tap water connection data.
ministry: Ministry of Jal Shakti – Department of Drinking Water & Sanitation
documents: Application via Gram Panchayat (for new connections)
fee: Free (nominal service charge by Gram Panchayat)

description: Apply for incentive under SBM for construction of Individual Household Latrines (IHHL) in rural areas. Track ODF village and Swachh Sarvekshan rankings.
ministry: Ministry of Jal Shakti – Department of Drinking Water & Sanitation

service_name: MGNREGS – Mahatma Gandhi National Rural Employment Guarantee
description: Register for MGNREGA job card to avail 100 days of guaranteed wage employment per year for rural households. Apply online and track payments through the NREGASoft portal.
documents: Bank Account / Post Office Account Details

service_name: PM Gram Sadak Yojana (PMGSY) – Road Status
description: Track construction and status of all-weather rural road connectivity under PMGSY for unconnected habitations. Citizen feedback mechanism for road quality.
Access Gram Panchayat accounts, plan activities, track fund utilization, and monitor rural governance through the eGram Swaraj unified portal for decentralized governance.
Register Self Help Groups (SHGs) under Deendayal Antyodaya Yojana – National Rural Livelihoods Mission for income generation, credit, and livelihood support for rural women.

service_name: PM Matru Vandana Yojana (PMMVY) – Maternity Benefit
description: Pregnant and lactating women can receive ₹6,000 (₹5,000 + ₹1,000 JSY incentive) in three installments for first live birth under Pradhan Mantri Matru Vandana Yojana.
documents: MCP Card (Mother and Child Protection Card)

description: Register children (0-6 years) and pregnant/lactating women at nearest Anganwadi centre for supplementary nutrition, immunization, health check-up, and early childhood care and education.
Open a government-backed savings account for a girl child (below 10 years) to save for her education and marriage with one of the highest interest rates among small savings schemes.
ministry: Ministry of Finance – Ministry of Women & Child Development
documents: Photograph of girl child and parent
fee: Minimum deposit ₹250 per year, maximum ₹1.5 lakh per year

description: Access information, locate beneficiary services, and avail incentives under the BBBP scheme aimed at addressing declining child sex ratio and promoting welfare and education of the girl child.
Register as prospective adoptive parents for domestic or inter-country adoption of orphaned, abandoned, or surrendered children through CARA's centralised adoption resource authority.
ministry: Ministry of Women & Child Development – CARA

service_name: PM Skill India – PMKVY Skill Training
description: Enroll in Pradhan Mantri Kaushal Vikas Yojana (PMKVY) short-term skill training programs with free certification, placement assistance, and monetary reward up to ₹8,000.
ministry: Ministry of Skill Development & Entrepreneurship – NSDC

service_name: Skill India Digital – Online Skill Courses
description: Access free and paid skill development courses across 100+ sectors on the Skill India Digital platform integrated with PMKVY, apprenticeship, and job placement services.
fee: Free for PMKVY-linked courses; fee for premium courses

description: Apply for UPSC Civil Services (IAS/IPS/IFS), engineering services, medical services, and other central services examinations through the official UPSC portal.
Apply for SSC CGL, CHSL, MTS, CPO, JE, GD Constable, and other central government staff selection examinations for Grade B and C positions.
ministry: Ministry of Personnel, Public Grievances & Pensions
documents: Educational Certificates (10th / 12th / Graduation as per post)

description: Apply for RRB NTPC, Group D, ALP, JE, RPF/RPSF, and para-medical staff recruitment examinations for Indian Railways conducted by Railway Recruitment Boards.
Apply to join the Indian Army, Navy, or Air Force as an Agniveer for a four-year service period under the Agnipath military recruitment scheme.
Apply for IBPS PO, Clerk, SO, RRB Officer, and RRB Office Assistant examinations for recruitment to public sector banks and regional rural banks.
ministry: Ministry of Finance – Institute of Banking Personnel Selection

service_name: Supreme Court of India – e-Filing & Case Status
description: File petitions, track case status, access cause lists, and view judgment orders at the Supreme Court of India through the official online portal.
documents: Case Number / SLP / Diary Number (for status query)
Certified Copies of Lower Court Orders

service_name: eCourts – District & High Court Case Status
description: Track case status, access cause lists, view judgments, and get SMS alerts for hearings at district courts, sessions courts, and high courts across India.
ministry: Department of Justice – Ministry of Law & Justice

service_name: Legal Services Authority – Free Legal Aid
description: Apply for free legal aid and representation from NALSA for SC/ST, women, children, persons with disabilities, victims of trafficking, and persons with income below prescribed limits.
documents: Income Certificate (below ₹1 lakh for most states)

description: Resolve pending court cases or pre-litigation disputes through Lok Adalat – a statutory alternative dispute resolution mechanism where no court fees are payable.
fee: Free (court fee refunded if settled at Lok Adalat)

description: Register complaints against insurance companies, check licensed insurers, access grievance redressal, and verify insurance agent registration through the IRDAI portal.
Lodge complaints against stock brokers, listed companies, mutual funds, and other SEBI-registered entities through SEBI SCORES (Complaint Redressal System).
ministry: Ministry of Finance – Securities & Exchange Board of India

description: File complaints against banks, NBFCs, and payment system operators for deficiency in services including unfair charges, fraud, and service denial through RBI Integrated Ombudsman Scheme.
Register complaints against companies for defective products, deficient services, unfair trade practices, and e-commerce fraud through the National Consumer Helpline.
ministry: Ministry of Consumer Affairs, Food & Public Distribution

description: Lodge and track grievances against any central government ministry, department, or public sector undertaking through the Centralised Public Grievance Redress and Monitoring System.
ministry: Ministry of Personnel, Public Grievances & Pensions – DARPG

description: Participate in government consultations, give feedback on policy drafts, contribute to surveys, and engage with government initiatives through the MyGov citizen participation platform.
File an online RTI application to any central government public authority or appeal against RTI rejection through the Central Information Commission's portal.
ministry: Ministry of Personnel – Central Information Commission
processing_time: 30 days (first response), 45 days (if involves third party)
fee: ₹10 per application; ₹2 per page for documents

service_name: India Portal – National Citizen Services Gateway
description: Access all central government information, services, forms, and scheme details through the National Portal of India – the single window for government services and information.
ministry: Ministry of Electronics & Information Technology – NIC

description: Book reserved train tickets (e-ticket and i-ticket), check PNR status, cancel bookings, apply for railway passes, and access all Indian Railways passenger services.
documents: Valid ID Proof (Aadhaar / Voter ID / PAN / Passport – one required for verification at station)
fee: Train fare as per class and distance + ₹15-30 service charge

description: File real-time complaints about train cleanliness, food quality, staff behaviour, and medical emergencies, and track resolution through Rail Madad during your journey.

service_name: DGCA – Civil Aviation Services & Pilot Licence
description: Apply for Pilot licence, airworthiness certification, aviation security approvals, and access all DGCA regulatory services for civil aviation in India.
Register on Digi Yatra for seamless, paperless and contactless airport entry using facial recognition at 24+ airports across India. Linked to Aadhaar and ticket booking.

service_name: India Post – Speed Post, Money Order & Services
description: Book Speed Post, Registered Post, and International Mail online. Access postal money orders, track shipments, locate post offices, and access postal financial services.
ministry: Department of Posts – Ministry of Communications
fee: ₹15-₹500 (varies by weight, distance, and service type)

description: Port your mobile number from one telecom operator to another while retaining the same number by sending an SMS or applying online through Department of Telecommunications.
ministry: Department of Telecommunications – Ministry of Communications

description: Register your mobile number on the Do Not Disturb registry, file complaints about unsolicited commercial communications (UCC), spam calls, and telemarketing through TRAI.
documents: Call details (time, date, caller number) for complaints

description: Access ISRO's satellite data, remote sensing applications, space technology transfer licences, and information about India's space research programs and satellite launches.
processing_time: Varies by data type and licence
fee: Free (open data), varies for licensed data

description: License patented CSIR technologies for commercial use, access scientific databases, and partner with CSIR labs for R&D collaboration and technology development.
fee: Varies by technology and licensing type

description: Access ICAR's crop variety releases, agro-advisory services, seed distribution programs, and research publications for improving agricultural productivity and sustainability.
ministry: Ministry of Agriculture & Farmers Welfare – ICAR

description: Access daily weather forecasts, cyclone alerts, monsoon predictions, agro-meteorological advisories, and climate data from India Meteorological Department.
fee: Free (public forecasts); paid for specialised reports

description: Access National Disaster Management Authority guidelines, disaster preparedness materials, and apply for ex-gratia relief in disaster-affected areas through state government portals.
ministry: National Disaster Management Authority – Ministry of Home Affairs

description: Register as an exporter of agricultural, processed food, and horticulture products, access quality certification, and avail export assistance from APEDA.
Register as a shrimp/fish exporter, access processing plant approvals, quality certification for EU/US markets, and export development assistance from MPEDA.
Access single-window investment facilitation for foreign direct investment (FDI) approvals, regulatory guidance, sector-specific investment opportunities, and state-level support.
ministry: Ministry of Commerce & Industry – Invest India
processing_time: Varies by sector and approval type

description: Obtain FSSAI licence or registration for food manufacturing, processing, distribution, or retail business. Mandatory for all food business operators (FBOs) in India.
ministry: Ministry of Health & Family Welfare – FSSAI

service_name: BIS – Bureau of Indian Standards Certification
description: Apply for BIS product certification (ISI Mark), Hallmarking of gold jewellery, Electronic and IT product mandatory certification (CRS), and access Indian Standards.
ministry: Ministry of Consumer Affairs – Bureau of Indian Standards

description: Apply for Legal Metrology Packaged Commodity (LMPC) Certificate for importing pre-packaged commodities or verify calibrated weighing instruments for trade.
ministry: Ministry of Consumer Affairs – Legal Metrology Division
documents: Label details (MRP, net quantity, importer address)

description: Register as an Insolvency Professional, file corporate insolvency resolution applications, access the Corporate Debtors database, and manage liquidation proceedings through IBBI portal.
Track DBT payments, check beneficiary payment status for government schemes, and verify fund release from PFMS under all central government schemes.
ministry: Ministry of Finance – Controller General of Accounts
documents: Aadhaar Number / Bank Account Number (for beneficiary search)

description: Link your Jan Dhan bank account with Aadhaar and mobile number to receive Direct Benefit Transfer (DBT) payments from government schemes directly without intermediaries.

service_name: NSAP – Pradhan Mantri Vaya Vandana Yojana (PMVVY)
description: Invest in PMVVY to receive guaranteed pension at 7.4% interest per annum for senior citizens aged 60 years and above through LIC of India. Maximum investment ₹15 lakh.
ministry: Ministry of Finance – LIC of India
fee: Investment from ₹1.56 lakh to ₹15 lakh (lump sum)

description: Update FASTag KYC, resolve blacklisted FASTag, get duplicate RC, check vehicle fitness renewal, pay green tax, and access all advanced Vahan portal features.

service_name: PM YASASVI – Scholarship for OBC/EBC Students
description: Apply for PM Young Achievers Scholarship Award Scheme for Vibrant India (YASASVI) for class 9 and 11 students from OBC, EBC, and DNT families with family income below ₹2.5 lakh.
ministry: Ministry of Social Justice & Empowerment – NTA

service_name: PM e-VIDYA – Digital Education & DTH Channels
description: Access free educational content through PM e-VIDYA including DIKSHA platform, SWAYAM MOOCs, 200+ DTH/IPTV channels, and One Nation One Digital Education platform.
processing_time: Instant (for content access); 30-60 days (for exam-based certificates)
fee: Free (SWAYAM courses), ₹1,000 (exam fee for credit transfer)

service_name: NABARD – Farmer Credit & Rural Development Finance
description: Access NABARD-refinanced loan products through cooperative banks and RRBs for farm credit, microfinance, rural infrastructure, and SHG-bank linkage programs.

service_name: PM Gati Shakti – Infra Projects Tracking
description: Access the National Master Plan for multi-modal connectivity to view and track major infrastructure projects including roads, railways, ports, and airports under PM Gati Shakti.

service_name: PHED / Jal Nigam – Water & Sewerage Connection
description: Apply for new piped water supply connection or sewerage connection from state Public Health Engineering Department (PHED) or Jal Nigam authorities.
ministry: State Public Health Engineering Department / Jal Nigam
documents: No-Objection Certificate (NOC) from housing society (if applicable)
fee: ₹1,000-₹5,000 (connection charge varies by state and pipe diameter)

description: Apply for consent to establish (CTE) and consent to operate (CTO) from Pollution Control Board for industries, and access environmental clearance and compliance reporting.
ministry: Ministry of Environment, Forest & Climate Change – CPCB

description: Apply for forest clearance, wildlife clearance, and environmental clearance for projects impacting forest land, and track compliance through Ministry of Environment's portal.
ministry: Ministry of Environment, Forest & Climate Change
documents: Village / Gram Sabha Resolution (for forest land)

service_name: NIC – NITI Aayog Aspirational Districts Programme
description: Track development progress in 112 Aspirational Districts across key health, nutrition, education, agriculture, financial inclusion, and infrastructure indicators.

service_name: PMGDISHA – Pradhan Mantri Gramin Digital Saksharta Abhiyan
description: Enroll for free digital literacy training under PMGDISHA for rural citizens to learn digital payments, internet services, and government e-services through authorised training centres.
ministry: Ministry of Electronics & IT – CSC e-Governance

description: Track establishment of new AIIMS and upgrading of Government Medical College hospitals under Pradhan Mantri Swasthya Suraksha Yojana for tertiary healthcare access.
Banks and financial institutions can initiate recovery proceedings for secured loans under SARFAESI Act. Borrowers can access DRT (Debt Recovery Tribunal) services and auction notices.
documents: Advocate Power of Attorney (for legal proceedings)

service_name: CIN – Corporate Identification & MCA Filing Status
description: Search and verify company details by CIN, check director history, view charge details, access annual filing compliance status, and download MCA documents.

service_name: PM KUSUM – Solar Pump & Grid Power for Farmers
description: Apply for standalone solar-powered agriculture pumps and solar power projects on barren land to generate income and reduce electricity cost for farmers under PM-KUSUM.
documents: Bank Loan Documents (if availing subsidy-linked loan)

service_name: GeM Seller – MSE, SHG & Artisan Registration
description: Register as an MSE, SHG, artisan, or weavers' cooperative on GeM to access government procurement with special preferences including purchase preference for MSEs and direct listing.

service_name: PMSBY – Pradhan Mantri Suraksha Bima Yojana
description: Enroll in PMSBY for accidental death and disability insurance cover of ₹2 lakh at a premium of just ₹20 per year, available through banks to account holders aged 18-70.
ministry: Ministry of Finance – Department of Financial Services

service_name: PMJJBY – Pradhan Mantri Jeevan Jyoti Bima Yojana
description: Enroll in PMJJBY for life insurance cover of ₹2 lakh at a premium of ₹436 per year, available through banks to account holders aged 18-50 with auto-debit from bank account.
ministry: Ministry of Finance – Department of Financial Services

description: Avail home loan interest subsidy under PMAY Credit Linked Subsidy Scheme (CLSS) for EWS (₹2.67 lakh), LIG (₹2.67 lakh), MIG-I (₹2.35 lakh), and MIG-II (₹2.30 lakh) categories.
Conduct banking transactions including cash withdrawal, balance enquiry, and Aadhaar-to-Aadhaar fund transfer using Aadhaar biometric authentication at Micro ATMs without debit card.
Access digitized land records, view Khasra / Khatauni / Record of Rights (RoR), apply for mutation, and track land transactions through the state land record portals under DILRMP.
Register property sale deeds, gift deeds, lease agreements, and other documents at Sub-Registrar offices through state e-Registration portals with online appointment booking.
documents: Aadhaar Cards of Buyer and Seller
fee: Stamp duty: 4-8% of property value (varies by state); Registration: 1%

service_name: e-District Services – State Government Integrated Portal
description: Apply online for 100+ state government services including income, caste, domicile, OBC certificates, ration card, and other state-issued documents through the e-District platform.
ministry: Ministry of Electronics & IT – State Governments
